desc:
f12v 特征描述

茎与花：单茎直立。顶端有三朵淡黄色、球状的花。花苞基部有红褐色斑点。
叶片：深绿色。放射状裂叶，边缘尖锐，像鸟的翅膀。
根部：独特的红褐色“蜘蛛状”或“卷轴状”卷曲结构。

Stem & Flowers: Single erect stem. Three pale-yellow, globular flowers at the top. Reddish-brown spots at the base of the buds.
Leaves: Deep green. Radiate lobed leaves with sharp edges, resembling bird wings.
Roots: Unique reddish-brown "spider-like" or "scroll-like" curling structure.
